parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ticket_audit_logs (ticket_id, event_type, event_data, workflow_name, node_name)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ticket_id ? '\'' + $json.ticket_id + '\'' : 'NULL' }},
  'WORKFLOW_FAILED',
  '{"error_type": "{{ $json.error_type }}", "error_message": {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message) }}, "node": "{{ $json.node_name }}"}',
  '{{ $json.workflow_name }}',
  '{{ $json.node_name }}'
);

INSERT INTO failed_jobs (ticket_id, payload, error_type, error_message, workflow_name, node_name)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ticket_id ? '\'' + $json.ticket_id + '\'' : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.full_error.replace("'", "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.error_type }}',
  '{{ $json.error_message.replace("'", "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.workflow_name }}',
  '{{ $json.node_name }}'
);

meta.description: Global error handler. Catches failures from all other workflows, classifies error type, logs to PostgreSQL, and decides whether to retry or terminate.
